title: CustomJoinMessage
description: is a Bukkit Plugin which allows you to change or turn off the join and quit messages of Minecraft.
body:
# **CustomJoinMessages**

Is a Bukkit Plugin which allows you to change or turn off the join and quit messages of Minecraft.
 
## Important:

**For this plugin to work you need the [LuckPerms](https://download.luckperms.net/1556/bukkit/loader/LuckPerms-Bukkit-5.4.141.jar) plugin.**

### Configuration:

The configuration file is located under plugins/CustomJoinMessages/config.yml


● This plugin can also completely disable the messages that appear when someone joins or leaves the server, which can be annoying or visually unappealing.
